utterance:
{
  "utterance": "In a world where every day feels like a fight, we build a beacon of hope. Introducing 'HopeLine', a platform that connects people directly with their representatives, ensuring their voices are heard. Every vote counts, every voice matters.",
  "title": "HopeLine",
  "track": "T01",
  "core_insight": "HopeLine uniquely combines direct democracy with modern technology, giving citizens a voice and empowering them to influence policy and legislation.",
  "your_role": "pm_visionary"
}

{
  "utterance": "ConnectHealth is a platform that uses AI to match patients with the most suitable mental health professionals, ensuring personalized care and improving mental well-being globally.",
  "title": "ConnectHealth",
  "track": "T01",
  "core_insight": "ConnectHealth leverages AI to personalize mental health care, addressing the global shortage of mental health professionals and providing accessible, effective treatment options.",
  "your_role": "pm_visionary"
}

{
  "utterance": "An app that turns everyday objects into iconic art pieces, democratizing the art world. Each object is scanned and transformed into a digital artwork, available for purchase. It’s the future of art, accessible to everyone.",
  "title": "Iconify",
  "track": "T03",
  "core_insight": "By democratizing the art world and turning everyday objects into iconic art, Iconify challenges traditional notions of art and accessibility. It uses modern technology to bridge the gap between the common and the extraordinary.",
  "your_role": "creative director and brand strategist"
}

{
  "utterance": "We will conquer the market with a groundbreaking app that revolutionizes remote work, ensuring seamless collaboration and productivity for teams worldwide.",
  "title": "MongolDesk: The Ultimate Remote Work Platform",
  "track": "T01",
  "core_insight": "MongolDesk integrates advanced AI for predictive analytics, real-time collaboration tools, and secure data sharing, addressing the critical social issue of remote work efficiency and security.",
  "your_role": "pm_visionary"
}
